label: Elite wild shiny multiplier
help: Multiplies the wild shiny rate on Elite difficulty. Stacks with the Shiny Charm and challenge Favour.

label: Hell wild shiny multiplier
help: Multiplies the wild shiny rate on Hell difficulty.

label: Youngster candy multiplier
help: Multiplies all candy gains on Youngster difficulty (the low-difficulty perk).

label: Ace candy multiplier
help: Multiplies all candy gains on Ace difficulty.

label: Global candy multiplier
help: Always-on Elite Redux candy buff, in AND out of runs, on top of everything else.

label: Black Shiny odds (1 in X)
help: A red/epic shiny upgrades to the ultra-rare Black Shiny with probability 1 in X. LOWER = more Black Shinies.

label: Extra candy per passive slot
help: Flat candy added per passive SLOT when unlocking the 2nd/3rd passive (slot 0/1/2 pays +0/+X/+2X on top of the halved base).

label: Favour per bonus step
help: How much total challenge Favour is needed for each +step of shiny/candy multiplier.

label: Multiplier gain per step
help: How much the shiny/candy multiplier rises per Favour step.

label: Favour multiplier cap
help: Hard cap on the Favour shiny/candy multiplier.

label: Cap with PU/NU usage tier
help: The raised Favour cap while a bottom usage-tier challenge (PU or NU) is active.

label: Favour per challenge
help: How much Favour each active challenge grants. Keys are the challenge ids.

label: Limited Support favour by tier
help: Favour for Limited Support: [off, no heal, no shop, both]. Must not decrease.

label: Usage Tier favour by tier
help: Favour for the Usage Tier challenge: [Off, UU, RU, PU, NU]. Must not decrease.

label: Usage tier gates (%)
help: Usage-percent ceilings a starter line must be BELOW for [UU, RU, PU, NU] legality. Must decrease.

label: Money streak cap per mon (%)
help: Max wave-money bonus one faint-free mon can hold (a full team of 6 stacks this 6 times).

label: Faint-free waves per +1%
help: How many consecutive faint-free waves a mon needs for each +1% money bonus.

label: Starting money
help: Money the player starts a run with (Daily seeds may override it).

label: Reroll base cost
help: Base cost of an unlocked reward reroll (scales with wave and doubles per reroll).

label: Locked-reroll cost by tier
help: Per-item base cost of a rarity-LOCKED reroll, by item tier [Common, Great, Ultra, Rogue, Master]. Must not decrease.

label: Biome shop price by slot tier
help: Price of each biome-shop slot tier, in waves of income. Calibrated against the income curve - nudge gently.

label: Biome discount multiplier
help: Price multiplier on a biome's DISCOUNTED categories.

label: Biome markup multiplier
help: Price multiplier on a biome's MARKED-UP categories.

label: Per-biome price modifier
help: Global price multiplier of each biome's shop (1 = normal, lower = cheaper).

label: Waves to hatch by egg tier
help: How many waves an egg of each tier takes to hatch.

label: Gacha tier thresholds
help: Tier roll thresholds out of 256 for [common, rare, epic] - the roll must be UNDER the value for at least that tier; what passes epic but not the offset is Legendary. Must decrease.

label: Egg pity thresholds
help: Pulls without a tier before that tier is FORCED (pity).

label: Egg shiny odds (1 in X)
help: Shiny odds per egg source. LOWER = more shinies.

label: Egg hidden-ability odds (1 in X)
help: Hidden-ability odds per egg source. LOWER = more HAs.

label: Manaphy egg odds (1 in X)
help: Chance a Manaphy egg hatches Manaphy instead of Phione.

label: Rare egg-move odds (1 in X)
help: Odds of the RARE egg move by egg tier [common, rare, epic, legendary]. Must decrease (rarer eggs roll it more).

label: Boosted rare egg-move odds
help: Same as above while an egg-move-boost event is active.

label: Classic candy-friendship multiplier
help: Multiplier on candy friendship gains in Classic (events may raise it further).

label: Friendship per Rare Candy
help: Friendship a mon gains when fed a Rare Candy.

label: Friendship lost on faint
help: Friendship a mon loses when it faints.

label: Candy friendship threshold by cost
help: Cumulative friendship needed to earn a candy, by starter cost 1-10. Must not decrease.

label: Passive unlock candy by cost
help: Candy cost to unlock a passive, by starter cost 1-12 (cheaper for expensive starters).

label: 1st cost reduction candy
help: Candy for the FIRST starter-point cost reduction, by starter cost 1-12.

label: 2nd cost reduction candy
help: Candy for the SECOND starter-point cost reduction, by starter cost 1-12.

label: Same-species egg candy by cost
help: Candy cost of the FIRST same-species egg, by starter cost 1-12 (hatch-count discounts still apply on top).

label: Daily Pokerus starters
help: How many random starters carry Pokerus each day.

label: Catch multiplier by ball
help: Catch-rate multiplier of each ball (Master Ball always catches and is not listed).

label: Critical-capture dex breakpoints
help: Pairs of [dex count, multiplier]: owning MORE than the count grants that critical-capture multiplier (highest matching pair wins). Counts must increase.

label: Resist berry chance (%)
help: Per-mon chance a trainer Pokemon holds a type-resist berry, by difficulty.

label: ER item conversion chance
help: Probability (0-1) that a trainer mon's ER-faithful held item is swapped for the vanilla baseline roll.

label: Ward Stones from wave
help: Earliest wave Ward Stones may appear, by difficulty.

label: Ward Stone charges by tier
help: CC-blocks each Ward Stone tier holds before it is spent.

label: Ward Stone recharge waves
help: Won waves an empty player-held stone needs to refill, by tier.

label: Ace Ward Stone chance (%)
help: Flat per-mon Ward Stone roll on Ace (boss gets Greater, regular gets Minor).

label: Elite/Hell boss: Prime chance (%)
help: Boss-mon roll under this % gets a PRIME stone. Keep it BELOW the Greater % below.

label: Elite/Hell boss: Greater chance (%)
help: Boss-mon roll under this % (and over the Prime %) gets a GREATER stone.

label: Elite/Hell regular: Greater chance (%)
help: Regular trainer-mon roll under this % gets a GREATER stone. Keep it BELOW the Minor % below.

label: Elite/Hell regular: Minor chance (%)
help: Regular trainer-mon roll under this % (and over the Greater %) gets a MINOR stone.

label: Trainer megas from wave (Ace/Elite)
help: Earliest wave a trainer mon may Mega-evolve on Ace/Elite. Hell is always exempt.

label: Elite trainer BST cap ladder
help: Pairs of [up-to-wave, BST cap] for Elite trainer mons; over-cap mons devolve or get swapped. Waves and caps must both increase. No cap after the last wave.

label: Elite boss BST headroom
help: Extra BST allowance for boss-wave trainer mons on top of the ladder cap.

label: Elite legendaries from wave
help: Wave before which legendary-likes are banned from Elite trainer teams.

label: Trainer strength ramp span
help: Wave depth at which the STRONGEST trainer teams are reached, per difficulty. Lower = faster ramp.

label: Enemy level: linear divisor
help: Enemy level grows by wave/X linearly. LOWER = enemies level FASTER.

label: Enemy level: quadratic divisor
help: Enemy level also grows by (wave/X) squared. LOWER = much faster late-game levels.

label: Boss level multiplier
help: Boss-wave enemies are this many times the regular curve level.

label: Enemy held-item odds (1 in X)
help: Enemy held-item roll chance per mode (1 in X per slot). LOWER = enemies hold MORE items.
